creator: trevor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

I feel that a patch along these lines is still needed, so I'm 
reopening this for reconsideration.  The test which this PR changes 
does not match the rest of bsd.port.mk.  It gives an error when 
there are empty patches/ and pkg/ directories.  When a user checks 
out the ports tree from CVS without using the -P option, these 
empty directories are generated because of the way the layout was 
changed.  Removal of Attic files (a practice which I wish we would 
end) may be causing these empty directories to appear (or remain) 
under some other circumstances which I don't understand.  The result 
is that users are being needlessly confused (see messages on the 
ports list which I have archived at 
http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/oldlayout.txt).
